title: Table S2: microfluidic RT-qPCR assay data for viral genes
author: Institut National de Recherche pour l'Agriculture, l'Alimentation et l'Environnement
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Please find attached the file containing the RT-qPCR data for viral gene analysis.   
  Each line correspond to one sample. For each sample you will find the following informations:  
 
  The sample name (-> "Sample" column)  
  The quantified gene (-> "Genes" column)  
  The raw Ct value (-> "Ct" column")  
  The value of fold change, relative to the pool of all samples analyzed in microfluidic RT-qPCR (-> "FC" column)  
  The time post-infection in hours (-> "Time" column)  
  The viral strain used to infect the cells (-> "Virus" column)  
  The virulence of the strain used to infect the cells (-> "Virulence" column)  
  The biological origin (piglet donor) of the analyzed cells (-> "Pig" column)  
  The classification of the considered viral gene, according to the clustering analysis based on the derivative fold change, as shown in Fig 3 (-> "Cluster" column)
